2603.18795.title: Perceptio: Perception Enhanced Vision Language Models via Spatial Token Generation
2603.18795.paper_summary: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) excel at semantic understanding but struggle with fine grained spatial grounding, as the model must implicitly infer complex geometry without ever producing a spatial interpretation. We present Perceptio, a perception enhanced LVLM with 2D and 3D spatial reasoning abilities, enabled via explicit semantic segmentation tokens and depth tokens generated directly within the autoregressive sequence. Concretely, we (i) distill a VQVAE depth codebook from a strong monocular teacher to tokenize dense depth into compact sequences, and (ii) integrate SAM2 based semantic segmentation tokens and VQ-VAE depth tokens inside the LLM so the model first emits spatial tokens and then answers. To stabilize depth token generation, we introduce novel composite depth-token objectives (marker, token, and count losses) and a soft-merging technique for differentiable reconstruction. We adopt a multi-task co-training strategy across diverse datasets, letting the model learn perception tokens to tackle multiple downstream tasks. Building on InternVL, Perceptio achieves state-of-the-art performance across benchmarks: improving referring expression segmentation by +0.8/+1.4/+1.1 cIoU on RefCOCO/+/g HardBLINK spatial understanding accuracy by 10.3%, and MMBench accuracy by 1.0%, demonstrating that explicit spatial chain-of-thought materially strengthens spatial grounding in LVLMs.
2603.18795.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（LVLMs）在語義理解方面表現優異，但在細緻的空間定位上卻面臨挑戰，因為模型必須隱式推斷複雜的幾何形狀，而不會產生空間解釋。我們提出了Perceptio，一種增強感知的LVLM，具備2D和3D空間推理能力，這是通過在自回歸序列中直接生成的明確語義分割標記和深度標記來實現的。具體而言，我們（i）從一個強大的單眼教師中提煉出VQVAE深度字典，以將密集的深度標記為緊湊的序列，並（ii）在LLM內部整合基於SAM2的語義分割標記和VQ-VAE深度標記，使模型首先發出空間標記，然後再回答。為了穩定深度標記生成，我們引入了新穎的復合深度標記目標（標記、標記和計數損失）以及一種用於可微重建的軟合併技術。我們採用跨多樣數據集的多任務共同訓練策略，讓模型學習感知標記以應對多個下游任務。基於InternVL，Perceptio在基準測試中實現了最先進的性能：在RefCOCO/+/g HardBLINK上將參考表達分割提升了+0.8/+1.4/+1.1 cIoU，空間理解準確率提高了10.3%，MMBench準確率提高了1.0%，證明了明確的空間思維鏈顯著加強了LVLMs中的空間定位。
2603.18795.author: Yuchen Li et.al.
2603.18795.authors: Yuchen Li, Amanmeet Garg, Shalini Chaudhuri, Rui Zhao, Garin Kessler
